reviews.comment:
Le pido que cargue 1000$ me lleno el tanque, no se hizo responsable nos faltó el respeto. Dexi que teníamos plata para pagarle. Símil a un robo

(Translated by Google)
I asked him to fill up my tank with $1000 worth of gas, but he refused to take responsibility and was disrespectful. He told us we had the money to pay him. It felt like robbery.

reviews.comment:
Servicio de expendio de nafta, bueno, solicitaria, que hagan respetar el sentido de señalización de sentido que tiene cada isla, protocolo de covid, cumplen normativa. Excelentes beneficios,  con pago de aplicación. Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Gas station service is good, but I would request that they enforce the directional signage at each pump island and comply with COVID protocols. They do comply with regulations. Excellent benefits with app-based payment. Recommended.

reviews.comment:
La atención fue muy buena ,pero no puedo entender que no me hayan podido hacer factura A..dicen que todavía no lo tenian incorporado???.... me hicieron una factura  a consumidor final .. DEBEN AVISAR ANTES CARGAR ...

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good, but I can't understand why they couldn't issue me an invoice (type A). Did they say they hadn't implemented that feature yet? They issued me a final consumer invoice. They should notify customers before loading the invoice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLeWNDNE1REAE
